anti_capture_rules: No token or protocol mechanism may claim legitimacy without evidence, challenge, and commons return.
Speculation cannot be disguised as public-good standing.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for crypto/protocol seed exploration only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A crypto/protocol seed is production-grade only when threat model, incentives, failure modes, and non-token fallback are explicit.

canon_conditions: The protocol improves verifiability or coordination without rent extraction.
compost_conditions: The protocol depends on hype, opaque incentives, or unavoidable speculation.

strongest_objections: The protocol may recreate token speculation under sacred or governance language.

failure_conditions: The mechanism rewards speculation more than verified coordination.
claim.scope: A protocol seed for verifiable standing, funding, or coordination rails.
success_conditions: The mechanism makes evidence, challenge, or commons funding easier without central capture.
claim.text: This crypto/protocol seed can add verifiable coordination without turning SAB into a token project.

commons_return.minimum_return: Protocol gains must fund open evidence, open tooling, or shared infrastructure.

title: Crypto Protocol Seed Template
